DEFENDANTS HUSEYIN TOKSOY, MANSUR SURUCUOGLU, IDRIS ISIK, UGUR SURUCUOGLU ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
